name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning check-in from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Just a gentle heads-up before the chairs fill up. A few new faces reached out yesterday, and a handful of cleanings and consults moved through the books. Nothing that needs firefighting — just wanted you to walk in with the picture already in your head.

If anything looks off when you peek at the dashboard, it's probably worth a quick look before the 9am. Otherwise, enjoy the coffee.

Warmly,
Bright Smile Dental
